metadata.desc: Monitors chat images and uses VLM to auto-classify and store them. Intelligently matches and sends emotes based on conversation mood. Supports LLM proactive emoji search, WebUI management panel, smart emotion matching, and multi-platform compatibility.

steal_emoji.hint: Monitors and saves images from chat. Requires visual model support.

steal_mode.hint:
probability=Probability mode: roll chance on each received image
cooldown=Cooldown mode: enforce minimum interval between steals

steal_chance.hint: Probability of stealing on each received image. 0.0=never, 1.0=always. Recommended: 0.2-0.5

image_processing_cooldown.description: Steal cooldown in seconds (in cooldown mode)
image_processing_cooldown.hint: Minimum interval between two steals in seconds. 0=no limit.

content_filtration.hint: Uses VLM to review image content. May increase processing time.

auto_send.hint: Bot will automatically send emotes during conversation. Test first.

emoji_chance.hint: Probability of auto-sending an emote. 0.0=never, 1.0=always. Recommended: 0.1-0.3

send_emoji_as_gif.hint:
On: send as GIF (closer to native emoji style)
Off: send in original format (png/jpg/gif etc.)

High-frequency GIF sending may cause high memory usage.

emoji_send_delay.hint:
Wait this long before sending emoji to avoid conflicts with message segmentation plugins.
Recommended: >= 5.0s. Set to 0 to send immediately.

emoji_send_delay_random.hint:
On: random delay between [delay] ~ [max delay] for more natural timing
Off: use fixed delay

emoji_send_delay_max.hint: Only applies when random delay is enabled. Actual delay = random between [delay] ~ [max].

smart_emoji_selection.hint:
On: composite scoring (diversity + relevance + similarity)
Off: random selection (still avoids short-term repeats)

enable_natural_emotion_analysis.hint:
On: LLM mode (lightweight model analyzes semantics, doesn't modify LLM replies)
Off: Passive tag mode (LLM inserts emotion tags, modifies reply content)

Use /reset to clear context after switching modes.

emotion_analysis_provider_id.hint: Leave blank to use current session model. A lightweight free model is recommended.

vision_provider_id.hint: Leave blank to auto-use AstrBot's global default_image_caption_provider_id.

send_target_whitelist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. When non-empty, only whitelisted targets can receive emotes.

send_target_blacklist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. Can be combined with whitelist; priority controls conflict resolution.

send_target_filter_mode.hint: whitelist_first=whitelist takes priority, blacklist_first=blacklist takes priority.

steal_target_whitelist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. When non-empty, only whitelisted targets allow stealing.

steal_target_blacklist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. Can be combined with whitelist; priority controls conflict resolution.

steal_target_filter_mode.hint: whitelist_first=whitelist takes priority, blacklist_first=blacklist takes priority.

max_reg_num.hint: Storage limit. Old images are removed when the limit is exceeded.

custom_emoji_classification_prompt.hint: Edit directly. {emotion_list} will be replaced with the category list. Delete all and save, then reload plugin to restore defaults.

custom_emoji_classification_with_filter_.hint: Used when content filtration is enabled. Delete all and save, then reload plugin to restore defaults.

napcat_token.hint: Only needed in special network setups: Docker AstrBot + local NapCat where auto token detection fails. Leave blank to auto-detect from OneBot adapter config.
